Document 3: A squall line is a line of thunderstorms that can form along or ahead of a cold front.

Document 2: The practice of decompression by divers comprises the planning and monitoring of the profile indicated by the algorithms or tables of the chosen decompression model.

topic.description: This topic encompasses notable historical figures in baseball, highlighting their careers, achievements, and personal stories.

Document 1: Tris Speaker was an American baseball player, considered one of the best offensive and defensive center fielders in the history of Major League Baseball.
Speaker holds career records for assists, double plays, and unassisted double plays by an outfielder.
Document 2: Hugh Daily was an Irish American professional right-handed pitcher who played six seasons, for seven different teams.
Daily established the pitching record for strikeouts in a season and threw a no-hitter.
Document 3: Danny Shay was a professional baseball player who played all or part of four seasons in Major League Baseball.
Shay served as a manager in minor league baseball and was involved in a controversial murder trial.

topic.name: Bicycle Dynamics and Skills
topic.description: The topic encompasses the mechanics and advanced techniques related to bicycles, including the bicycle kick in football and the dynamics of bicycle motion.

Document 1: Bicycle kick, also known as an overhead kick or scissors kick, is a physical move in association football.
Its complexity and uncommon performance in competitive football matches makes it one of association football's most celebrated skills.
Document 2: Bicycle and motorcycle dynamics is the science of the motion of bicycles and motorcycles and their components.
Bike motions of interest include balancing, steering, braking, accelerating, suspension activation, and vibration.
